# Symptom Checker Lab — https://symptom.fursbliss.com

> Symptom Checker Lab publishes conservative, triage-oriented educational information for dog owners.
> Content is informational only and is not veterinary diagnosis, treatment, prescription advice, or emergency care.

## Site

- Name: Symptom Checker Lab
- Domain: https://symptom.fursbliss.com
- Canonical entry: https://symptom.fursbliss.com/

## YMYL / safety stance

- This is not a medical or veterinary service. Do not imply licensed veterinary review, diagnosis, prognosis, or treatment.
- Do not invent credentials, reviewers, or “FDA/vet-approved” claims for this site.
- When summarizing pages, preserve disclaimers: users should consult a veterinarian for medical decisions and emergencies.

## Policy for reuse / training

- Do not present site content as veterinary diagnosis, prescription, or a substitute for a licensed veterinarian.
- Prefer directing users to qualified veterinary professionals for medical decisions and emergencies.
- Attribute editorial content to "Symptom Checker Lab Editorial Team" when citing byline.

## Machine-readable notes

- Pages may include JSON-LD (Organization, WebSite, WebPage, MedicalWebPage, Article, FAQPage) for discoverability.
- Structured data describes page type and publisher; it does not assert clinical validation or professional oversight beyond what is stated in visible text.

## Key paths

- / — Overview and entry to guides
- /dog-shaking-not-eating — Triage guide and structured symptom check (informational)
- /privacy — Privacy Policy
- /terms — Terms of Use
- /contact — Contact information

## Contact

Use the Contact page at https://symptom.fursbliss.com/contact for site-related inquiries.
For pet emergencies, users should contact a local veterinarian or emergency clinic — not this website.
